title: Copy List with Random Pointer
input_format: The `head` of a linked list where each node has an additional `random` pointer which can point to any node in the list, or `null`.
output_format: The head of the deep copied linked list.
constraints:
- `0 <= n <= 1000`
- `-10^4 <= Node.val <= 10^4`
- `Node.random` is `null` or is pointing to some node in the linked list.
